name: Patient-Derived Xenograft (PDX) Subcutaneous Implantation

usage.en: Subcutaneous implantation of frozen or fresh patient-derived tumor xenograft tissue into immunodeficient mice, with propagation and tissue banking procedures.
usage.zh: 将冻存或新鲜的 PDX 肿瘤组织皮下移植到免疫缺陷小鼠，包括传代和组织冻存流程。

materials.name: Sterile surgical tools, clean surgical blades
Cryogenic vials and freezing container (Nalgene Cryo 1°C)

components.name: Step 1 (Thaw frozen tissue): Roll vial between hands 10–15 s. Thaw in 37°C water bath until small ice crystal remains (~2 min). Spray with 70% ethanol.

note.en: Wear eye protection — vials may explode from LN₂ storage.
note.zh: 戴护目镜——液氮储存的冻存管可能爆裂。

components.name: Step 2 (Wash): Pour tissue into 50 mL tube. Slowly add 10 mL culture medium. Mix gently. Spin 200×g, 5 min, RT. Remove supernatant. Repeat wash once.

note.en: Add medium slowly to prevent osmotic shock.
note.zh: 缓慢加培养基防止渗透冲击。

components.name: Step 3: Resuspend in 0.5 mL PBS. Keep on ice. ~0.5 cm³ tissue per implant.
Step 4: Anesthetize mouse — ketamine 10 mg/mL, 100 µL per 10 g body weight (IP), or isoflurane per institutional protocol.
Step 5: Shave between shoulder blades. Spray shaved area with 70% ethanol.
Step 6: Make 2–3 mm skin incision. Insert curved mosquito forceps 1–1.5 cm into deep fascia toward flank.
Step 7: Implant ~0.5 cm³ prepared tumor tissue into pocket. Collect spilled cells with 1 mL syringe (no needle) and inject into pocket.
Step 8: Close with 1–2 wound clips. Monitor 24 h for distress or missing clips. Remove clips at 10–14 days (manual restraint only).
Step 9 (Propagation): Harvest tumors at ≤1.5 cm longest dimension (3–12 weeks). Clean tumor of connective/necrotic tissue. Cut into ~0.5 cm³ pieces. Implant into new recipients.

Step 10 (Freezing): Cut tumor into ~0.5 cm³ pieces. Place in cryovials with 1.5 mL freezing medium (50% FBS + 40% DMEM + 10% DMSO). Slow-freeze in Nalgene container at −80°C overnight, then transfer to liquid nitrogen.

detailedSteps.en: Roll cryovial between hands 10–15 s. Thaw in 37°C water bath until a small ice crystal remains (~2 min). Spray with 70% ethanol. Wear eye protection.
detailedSteps.zh: 手掌间滚动冻存管 10–15 s。37°C 水浴融化至残留小冰晶（约 2 min）。70% 乙醇喷雾消毒。戴护目镜。

detailedSteps.en: Pour tissue into 50 mL tube. Slowly add 10 mL warm culture medium (DMEM/F12 + 10% FBS) to prevent osmotic shock. Mix gently. Spin 200×g, 5 min, RT. Remove supernatant. Repeat wash once.
detailedSteps.zh: 将组织倒入 50 mL 管。缓慢加入 10 mL 温培养基（DMEM/F12 + 10% FBS）防渗透冲击。轻柔混匀。200×g 离心 5 min，RT。去上清。重复洗涤一次。

detailedSteps.en: Resuspend tissue in 0.5 mL sterile PBS. Keep on ice. Prepare ~0.5 cm³ tissue pieces per implant.
detailedSteps.zh: 组织重悬于 0.5 mL 无菌 PBS。置于冰上。每个移植位点准备 ~0.5 cm³ 组织块。

detailedSteps.en: Anesthetize mouse: ketamine 10 mg/mL, 100 µL per 10 g body weight (IP), or isoflurane (2–3% induction, 1–1.5% maintenance) per IACUC protocol. Confirm anesthesia by loss of toe-pinch reflex.
detailedSteps.zh: 麻醉小鼠：氯胺酮 10 mg/mL，每 10 g 体重 100 µL（腹腔注射），或异氟烷（2–3% 诱导，1–1.5% 维持）按 IACUC 方案。夹趾反射消失确认麻醉。

detailedSteps.en: Shave area between shoulder blades with electric clipper. Disinfect shaved area with 70% ethanol.
detailedSteps.zh: 电推剪剃除肩胛骨间毛发。70% 乙醇消毒。

detailedSteps.en: Make 2–3 mm skin incision with sterile scalpel. Insert curved mosquito forceps 1–1.5 cm into deep subcutaneous fascia toward the flank to create a pocket.
detailedSteps.zh: 无菌手术刀切 2–3 mm 皮肤切口。弯蚊式钳深入皮下筋膜 1–1.5 cm 向侧腹方向形成口袋。

detailedSteps.en: Implant ~0.5 cm³ tumor tissue into pocket using forceps. If tissue fragments spill, collect with 1 mL syringe (no needle) and reinject into pocket.
detailedSteps.zh: 钳子将 ~0.5 cm³ 肿瘤组织植入口袋。如组织碎片溢出，用 1 mL 注射器（无针头）收集注入口袋。

detailedSteps.en: Close incision with 1–2 wound clips. Apply topical antibiotic if per protocol. Administer buprenorphine (0.05–0.1 mg/kg SC) for analgesia.
detailedSteps.zh: 1–2 个伤口夹闭合切口。如方案要求外用抗生素。皮下注射丁丙诺啡（0.05–0.1 mg/kg）镇痛。

detailedSteps.en: Place mouse on warm pad until recovery from anesthesia (~30 min). Monitor 24 h for distress, wound dehiscence, or missing clips. Remove wound clips at 10–14 days (manual restraint only, no anesthesia).
detailedSteps.zh: 将小鼠放在加温垫上直到麻醉苏醒（约 30 min）。24 h 监测是否有不适、伤口裂开或夹子脱落。10–14 天后徒手保定拆除伤口夹（无需麻醉）。

detailedSteps.en: Measure tumors 2× weekly with calipers. Volume = (length × width²) / 2. Harvest at ≤1.5 cm longest dimension (typically 3–12 weeks).
detailedSteps.zh: 游标卡尺每周 2 次测量肿瘤。体积 =（长 × 宽²）/ 2。最长径 ≤1.5 cm 时取材（通常 3–12 周）。

detailedSteps.en: Harvest tumor aseptically. Remove connective tissue and necrotic areas. Cut into ~0.5 cm³ pieces. For propagation: implant fresh tissue into new recipient mice.
detailedSteps.zh: 无菌取出肿瘤。去除结缔组织和坏死区域。切成 ~0.5 cm³ 块。传代：将新鲜组织植入新受体小鼠。

detailedSteps.en: For banking: place ~0.5 cm³ pieces in cryovials with 1.5 mL freezing medium (50% FBS + 40% DMEM + 10% DMSO). Slow-freeze in Nalgene Mr. Frosty at −80°C overnight, then transfer to liquid nitrogen for long-term storage.
detailedSteps.zh: 冻存：~0.5 cm³ 组织块放入冻存管，加 1.5 mL 冻存液（50% FBS + 40% DMEM + 10% DMSO）。Nalgene Mr. Frosty −80°C 过夜慢速降温，后转移至液氮长期保存。

detailedSteps.en: Save representative tissue: formalin-fix for histology (H&E), snap-freeze for protein/RNA, embed in OCT for cryosection.
detailedSteps.zh: 保留代表性组织：福尔马林固定用于组织学（H&E）、速冻用于蛋白/RNA、OCT 包埋用于冰冻切片。

briefSteps.en: Thaw frozen tumor → Wash 2× in medium → Prepare ~0.5 cm³ pieces on ice → Anesthetize mouse → Shave & disinfect → Incise skin → Create SC pocket → Implant tissue → Clip wound → Monitor 2×/week → Harvest at ≤1.5 cm → Propagate or freeze-bank
briefSteps.zh: 融化冻存肿瘤 → 培养基洗 2× → 冰上准备 ~0.5 cm³ 组织块 → 麻醉小鼠 → 剃毛消毒 → 切开皮肤 → 制作皮下口袋 → 植入组织 → 夹闭伤口 → 每周 2 次监测 → ≤1.5 cm 取材 → 传代或冻存

note.en: Prepared tissue pieces can be kept on ice in PBS for 1–2 hours before implantation
note.zh: 准备好的组织块可在 PBS 冰上保存 1–2 小时后再移植

note.en: Frozen tumor tissue in liquid nitrogen can be stored indefinitely (years)
note.zh: 液氮中的冻存肿瘤组织可无限期保存（数年）

stoppingPoints.condition: Keep tissue on ice in PBS

notes.en: Tumor growth varies by xenograft line (3–12 weeks to 1.5 cm). Monitor twice weekly. Save representative tissue for histology (formalin), protein/RNA (snap freeze), and OCT embedding. Freezing medium: 50% FBS, 40% DMEM, 10% DMSO — prepare fresh.
notes.zh: 肿瘤生长因品系而异（3–12 周至 1.5 cm）。每周检查两次。保留代表性组织用于组织学（福尔马林）、蛋白/RNA（速冻）和 OCT 包埋。冻存液：50% FBS、40% DMEM、10% DMSO——现配现用。

ref: Adapted from NCI PDXNet recommendations; JoVE Protocol 54393
